schemes.benefit_en: Rs 15,000 in 6 installments for girl child education & welfare
schemes.benefit_hi: बालिका शिक्षा व कल्याण हेतु 6 किस्तों में ₹15,000
schemes.eligibility: UP families with annual income < Rs 3 lakh, girl child

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5 lakh compensation for farmer accidental death/disability
schemes.benefit_hi: किसान दुर्घटना मृत्यु/अपंगता पर ₹5 लाख मुआवजा
schemes.eligibility: UP farmers aged 18-70, accidental death or disability

schemes.benefit_en: 300 units free electricity per month for domestic consumers
schemes.benefit_hi: घरेलू उपभोक्ताओं को 300 यूनिट मुफ्त बिजली

schemes.benefit_en: Additional housing grant for urban slum dwellers not covered under PMAY
schemes.benefit_hi: PMAY से वंचित शहरी गरीबों को आवास सहायता
schemes.eligibility: Urban BPL families without own home in UP

schemes.benefit_en: Online land records, Khatauni, Khasra accessible free
